interface: DynamoDB API 2012-08-10 via AWS SDK for Go v2 (service/dynamodb + feature/dynamodb/attributevalue)

:since.meaning: unix seconds encoded as a number string

query.pagination: pass LastEvaluatedKey verbatim as ExclusiveStartKey on the next call; the result set is complete only when LastEvaluatedKey is empty; an empty Items page with a non-empty LastEvaluatedKey is NOT the end
query.limit: Limit caps items evaluated per page and is omitted entirely when the caller sets 0

batch_write_item.request_shape: RequestItems maps table name to a list of WriteRequest{PutRequest{Item}}
batch_write_item.unprocessed_items: same shape as RequestItems; resend only these entries on retry, with exponential backoff; items accepted by earlier calls must never be resent
batch_write_item.atomicity: individual puts are atomic, the batch as a whole is not
batch_write_item.whole_call_throttle: ProvisionedThroughputExceededException is returned when none of the items could be processed; the whole batch is retried with backoff

consumed_capacity.query: single ConsumedCapacity object with CapacityUnits (float), absent unless requested
consumed_capacity.batch_write_item: list of ConsumedCapacity entries, one per table

retry_policy.delay_formula: delay = min(max_delay, base_delay * 2^attempt) with attempt starting at 0
retry_policy.bound: at most MaxBatchRetries additional calls per 25-item chunk, then fail with the unprocessed count preserved
